Repeatable to: 8 credits.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

JAPN401 Readings in Modern Japanese Literature (3 Credits) Development of advanced reading, vocabulary, grammar, and translation skills through selected readings in Japanese drawn primarily from modern literature.

Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in JAPN302; or permission of instructor.
